channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Cerebras pops 68% in Nasdaq debut, pushing the AI chipmaker's market cap to $95 billion
item.description: Cerebras is taking advantage of a bull market for silicon, as the chipmaker becomes one of the most notable pureplay AI IPOs to date.

item.title: Xi warns Trump: Mishandling Taiwan will put U.S.-China relationship in 'great jeopardy'
item.description: President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.

item.title: Stock futures are little changed after Dow retakes 50,000: Live updates
item.description: Wall Street is coming off yet another positive session, with both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite closing at record highs.

item.title: Supreme Court allows mail-order of abortion pill mifepristone pending appeal
item.description: Two drugmakers, Danco Laboratories and GenBioPro, had asked the Supreme Court to lift an appeals court ban on mifepristone being distributed via mail.

item.title: Dow jumps 370 points to recapture 50,000; S&P 500 posts first close above 7,500: Live updates
item.description: Stocks were higher on Thursday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average retaking 50,000 after strong earnings from Cisco Systems.

item.title: Gemini surges after Winklevoss Capital Fund invests $100 million in the crypto exchange
item.description: The company also topped revenue expectations for the quarter and posted a narrower-than-expected loss than analysts anticipated, according to FactSet.

item.title: China will order 200 Boeing jets, Trump tells Fox News
item.description: President Donald Trump told Fox News that China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, according to a clip that aired Thursday.

item.title: Ford surges nearly 20% in two days. It might be an AI 'meme' stock after energy pivot
item.description: Ford Motor shares have been on a tear the past couple days, rising on buzz over its ties to the energy storage market.

item.title: Dems demand Lutnick resign over Epstein interview: 'You lied'
item.description: The White House said in February that President Donald Trump, who has also faced scrutiny over his ties to Epstein, continues to stand behind Lutnick.

item.title: Group led by Egon Durban to buy 25% of Las Vegas Raiders at $9.9 billion valuation, sources say
item.description: First Football is selling its 25% stake in the team to a group led by Egon Durban at a $9.9 billion valuation.

item.title: Bessent sees 'substantial disinflation' ahead as Warsh takes over the Fed
item.description: Bessent said the energy-fed inflation surge recently is likely to reverse as the U.S. is "going to keep pumping."

item.title: Analysis: Trump finally gets his man at the Fed. Will Kevin Warsh disappoint him?
item.description: Kevin Warsh received the fewest votes of any Fed chair in history. Will it cripple him?

item.title: Cramer urges investors to be more selective in the AI frenzy
item.description: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said investors should be more selective when investing in the semiconductor rally.

item.title: Bolster your portfolio for hot inflation with these ETFs, Bank of America says
item.description: Corners of the market are poised to hold up in an an inflationary environment, the bank found.

item.title: Bond market believes Fed behind the curve on inflation as Warsh takes over
item.description: Bond traders are hoping that the central bank's easing bias is replaced with a skewed view toward tightening.

item.title: SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO is coming. This overlooked industrial company will be a big winner
item.description: Club name Linde has been labeled "the Exxon of space."

item.title: SpaceX IPO prospectus could land as soon as next week, sources say
item.description: Elon Musk's reusable rocket company is getting closer to what's expected to be a record stock market debut.

item.title: Fed Governor Miran submits resignation, throws support behind Warsh as new chair
item.description: Miran served as a contrarian voice on the rate-setting Federal Open Market Committee.

item.title: Kash Patel appeals dismissal of defamation lawsuit against ex-FBI official Figliuzzi
item.description: Kash Patel, the FBI director, is separately suing The Atlantic for allegedly defaming him with an article that said he has abused alcohol.

item.title: CDC says there are no U.S. hantavirus cases currently, 41 people being monitored
item.description: The CDC said the risk to the general public from hantavirus remains low.

item.title: What's good for Cisco is good for Broadcom. 3 reasons both stocks are soaring
item.description: Cisco investors aren't the only victors from the network company's blowout earnings.

item.title: World of Hyatt’s award chart is changing soon, and many stays are getting more expensive. Here's what you need to know
item.description: World of Hyatt’s award chart is expanding from three to five redemption levels, with points prices increasing for most nights. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Chinese parts are already in U.S. cars as lawmakers warn Trump against China auto deal
item.description: Trump-Xi talks spark bipartisan warnings over Chinese automakers, U.S. auto jobs, connected vehicles and China’s growing role in the supply chain.

item.title: Crypto industry scores win as Clarity Act regulation bill clears Senate hurdle
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee advanced a rules-of-the-road crypto bill known as the Clarity Act by a vote of 15-9.

item.title: Nearly 40% chances of stagflation by end of 2026, traders say
item.description: Traders are not optimistic about the state of economy by the end of this year, placing high chances of stagflation, a mix of high inflation and unemployment.

item.title: U.S. Border Patrol Chief Mike Banks resigns
item.description: Controversy over enforcement actions by Border Patrol and ICE led to a partial shutdown of DHS from February to late April.

item.title: Some short sellers are seeing opportunity in this tech mania. How they're spotting fake AI stocks
item.description: Hedge fund managers said the current environment — fueled by aggressive spending on AI — is creating a fertile backdrop for bearish wagers

item.title: UFC's Dana White urges Trump to reverse gambling tax law. His letter moved the prediction market
item.description: In the letter, Dana White said that the cap is already starting to create problems for the gambling industry.

item.title: China will work behind the scenes to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, Bessent says
item.description: President Trump held talks with President Xi during a two-day summit in Beijing on Thursday.

item.title: Musk's China trip during OpenAI trial prompts apology from his lawyer for CEO's absence
item.description: Musk sued his OpenAI co-founders Sam Altman and Greg Brockman, alleging they had violated a promise to keep their company a nonprofit.
